message:
fix(ci): inject PI_PLATFORM in JS runtime + fix Windows path separators

- Inject PI_PLATFORM env var from std::env::consts::OS at JS runtime
  init, matching the same mapping used by node:os. OSTYPE is a shell
  variable not always exported on macOS, causing process.platform to
  fall back to 'linux' instead of 'darwin'.

- Use .join(".pi").join("settings.json") instead of
  .join(".pi/settings.json") in e2e_cli config path tests. On Windows,
  the forward slash in the single-string join is preserved by display(),
  producing mixed separators that don't match the CLI binary output
  which uses two separate joins.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
